title.en: Probe-and-Refine Tuning of Repository Guidance for Coding Agents
title.zh: 面向代码代理的仓库指导的探测与精调

abstract: LLM-based coding agents need higher-level operational knowledge about a repository (which files house which subsystems, how to run the test suite, which workflows have historically led to wrong fixes) that does not exist in the code itself. Engineers typically maintain \texttt{AGENTS.md} files to supply this context as instructions for coding agents, but whether they help is contested: recent studies disagree on whether LLM-generated guidance improves or harms agent performance. In this paper we show that how the guidance is produced is the decisive variable, and introduce \emph{probe-and-refine tuning}: a procedure that uses synthetic bug-fix probes to iteratively diagnose and patch a repository's guidance file through single-shot LLM calls, with no agent loop or tool use during tuning. On SWE-bench Verified across four independent trials with Qwen3.5-35B-A3B at 200 steps, probe-and-refine achieves 33.0\,\% mean resolve rate vs.\ 28.3\,\% for the static knowledge base used to initialize it and 25.5\,\% for an unguided baseline ($p < 0.001$ for both probe-and-refine contrasts). The improvement comes from coverage rather than precision: refined guidance produces evaluable patches for 14.5 percentage points (pp) more instances while per-patch precision remains statistically constant ($\sim$59\,\%, $p = 0.119$), showing that improved guidance helps agents reach the correct file rather than improving the quality of the changes they make. Further, a step-budget experiment shows that guidance is what lets the agent use a larger step budget productively, and a cross-model experiment with NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B finds that the tuning loop degrades when the model cannot generate sufficiently diagnostic output, though per-patch precision remains constant even then.

relevance.en: This paper extends the repository-level code generation direction by showing that iterative tuning of textual guidance (rather than RLHF or execution feedback) significantly boosts file localization.  It is tangential to your focus on post-training techniques for patch correctness, since improvements here come from coverage, not patch quality.
relevance.zh: 本文通过展示迭代式文本指导精调（而非RLHF或执行反馈）能显著提升文件定位能力，扩展了仓库级代码生成方向。它对您关注的补丁正确性后训练技术是间接相关的，因为这里的改进来自覆盖率而非补丁质量。

figures.label: Figure 1

caption.en:
Probe-and-refine tuning pipeline. The static_kb artifact feeds both the static_kb condition directly and
the refinement loop, which transforms it into the refined guidance using synthetic probes and single-shot diagnosis. No
SWE-bench evaluation instances are used during refinement. All three conditions feed the same fixed coding agent.
caption.zh: 探测与精调流程。static_kb工件直接输入static_kb条件以及精调循环，通过合成探针和单次诊断转换为精调指导。精调过程中不使用SWE-bench评估实例。所有三种条件输入同一个固定的代码代理。

figures.reference_text: The probe-and-refine procedure (Figure 1) transforms generic structural knowledge into repo-specific operational guidance through iterative failure feedback. Every step in the procedure is a single-shot call to the same model (Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) that will later be used by the coding agent during patch generation. Using the same model keeps the experiment controlled: the guidance is written at the level the consuming model can understand, and any improvement must come from the content of the guidance rather than from a capability mismatch between a stronger tuning model and a weaker execution model.

figures.label: Figure 2

caption.en:
Guidance evolution for django/django. Generic rules (left) are replaced with repo-specific strategies (right)
over 5 iterations. The procedure independently converges on a reproduce-first workflow with subsystem-specific tracing
instructions, test paths, and middleware dependencies.
caption.zh: django/django的指导演变。通用规则（左）在5次迭代中被替换为仓库特定策略（右）。该过程独立收敛于一个先复现的工作流，包含子系统特定的追踪指令、测试路径和中间件依赖。

figures.reference_text: What the procedure discovers. After running the procedure, we see that the output is a qualitative shift from generic to specific (Figure 2). For Django, generic rules like “Verify repo priors with targeted reads” become “Trace through subclasses.py to map parent-child relationships.” Rules like “Run the smallest relevant test first” become “Always reference the specific test class/method (e.g., django/core/tests/test_checks.py::CheckTestCase) before proposing changes.” A pattern emerges independently across all 12 repositories: the procedure tends to add a reproduce-first diagnostic workflow (reproduce the failure, trace it to the responsible module, then patch) with repo-specific navigation and quality-gate strategies filling in subsequent phases. The removed rules are reasonable but vague, while the added rules encode the kind of operational knowledge that distinguishes a developer who has spent months in a codebase from one reading the README for the first time.

figure.label: Figure 1

caption.en:
Probe-and-refine tuning pipeline. The static_kb artifact feeds both the static_kb condition directly and
the refinement loop, which transforms it into the refined guidance using synthetic probes and single-shot diagnosis. No
SWE-bench evaluation instances are used during refinement. All three conditions feed the same fixed coding agent.
caption.zh: 探测与精调流程。static_kb工件直接输入static_kb条件以及精调循环，通过合成探针和单次诊断转换为精调指导。精调过程中不使用SWE-bench评估实例。所有三种条件输入同一个固定的代码代理。

figure.reference_text: The probe-and-refine procedure (Figure 1) transforms generic structural knowledge into repo-specific operational guidance through iterative failure feedback. Every step in the procedure is a single-shot call to the same model (Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) that will later be used by the coding agent during patch generation. Using the same model keeps the experiment controlled: the guidance is written at the level the consuming model can understand, and any improvement must come from the content of the guidance rather than from a capability mismatch between a stronger tuning model and a weaker execution model.

brief_summary.en:
LLM-based coding agents struggle because crucial operational knowledge—like which files contain which subsystems or how to run tests—isn't in the source code. Engineers often write `AGENTS.md` files to provide this context, but studies disagree on whether such guidance helps or hurts performance. The decisive factor, it turns out, is *how* the guidance is produced.

To address this, the authors introduce **probe-and-refine tuning**: a lightweight procedure that uses synthetic bug-fix probes to iteratively diagnose and patch a repository's guidance file via single-shot LLM calls—no expensive agent rollouts required. On SWE-bench Verified with Qwen3.5-35B-A3B, this method achieved a 33.0% resolve rate, significantly outperforming both a static knowledge base (28.3%) and an unguided baseline (25.5%). The improvement stems entirely from increased coverage—helping agents reach the correct file—rather than from better patch quality, which remained constant at ~59%. Crucially, refined guidance also enabled agents to productively use larger step budgets, while the tuning loop degraded when the model couldn't generate sufficiently diagnostic output. This work shows that iterative, same-model diagnosis is what makes guidance effective, pointing future efforts toward improving file localization rather than patch correctness.
brief_summary.zh:
基于LLM的代码代理面临一个关键问题：许多操作知识——比如哪些文件包含哪个子系统、如何运行测试——并不在源代码中。工程师通常会编写 `AGENTS.md` 文件来提供这些上下文，但现有研究对于这种指导是有益还是有害存在分歧。事实证明，决定性因素在于指导的生成方式。

为了解决这个问题，作者引入了**探测与精调（probe-and-refine tuning）**：一种轻量级方法，通过合成缺陷修复探针（synthetic bug-fix probes）迭代地诊断和修补仓库的指导文件，仅需单次LLM调用——无需昂贵的代理展开。在SWE-bench Verified上使用Qwen3.5-35B-A3B模型，该方法达到了33.0%的解决率，显著优于静态知识库（28.3%）和无指导基线（25.5%）。这种改进完全归因于覆盖率的提升——帮助代理正确定位文件——而非补丁质量的提高，后者保持在约59%不变。关键的是，精调后的指导还使代理能够高效地使用更大的步骤预算，而当模型无法生成足够诊断性的输出时，精调循环会退化。这项工作表明，迭代的同模型诊断才是使指导有效的关键，未来研究应聚焦于改进文件定位而非补丁正确性。

problem.en: LLM-based coding agents lack higher-level operational knowledge about a repository—such as which files house subsystems, how to run the test suite, and which workflows have historically led to wrong fixes—that is not present in the source code. Engineers typically maintain AGENTS.md files to supply this context as instructions for coding agents, but recent studies disagree on whether LLM-generated guidance improves or harms agent performance, leaving a contested gap. The decisive variable is how the guidance is produced; prior work treats guidance as static or generated without iterative adaptation to actual agent failures, resulting in inconsistent benefits. This matters in practice because ineffective guidance can waste compute time and degrade agent outcomes, while effective guidance could significantly boost productivity.
problem.zh: 基于LLM的代码代理缺乏关于仓库的高级操作知识——例如哪些文件包含子系统、如何运行测试套件、哪些工作流历史上导致错误修复——这些知识不在源代码中。工程师通常维护AGENTS.md文件来为代码代理提供这些上下文作为指令，但近期研究对于LLM生成的指导是改善还是损害代理性能存在分歧，留下一个争议缺口。决定性的变量是指导的生成方式；先前的工作将指导视为静态，或者没有根据实际代理失败进行迭代适应，导致不一致的收益。这在实践中很重要，因为无效的指导可能浪费计算时间并降低代理结果，而有效的指导可以显著提高生产力。

solution.en: The main contribution is probe-and-refine tuning, a procedure that transforms generic structural repository knowledge into repo-specific operational guidance through iterative failure feedback, using only single-shot LLM calls with no agent loop or tool use during tuning. The key insight is to use synthetic bug-fix probes—minimal bug instances—to elicit diagnostic failures from the same model that will later serve as the coding agent, then patch the guidance file based on those diagnoses. This contrasts with prior work that either uses static guidance or relies on expensive agent rollouts for refinement. The procedure isolates guidance quality as the variable of interest, showing that how guidance is produced (iterative diagnosis from same-model probes) is what makes it effective, not the guidance content alone.
solution.zh: 主要贡献是探测与精调（probe-and-refine tuning），一种通过迭代失败反馈将通用结构仓库知识转化为仓库特定操作指导的过程，仅使用单次LLM调用，精调过程中没有代理循环或工具使用。关键见解是使用合成缺陷修复探针（最小缺陷实例）从后续将作为代码代理的同一模型中引出诊断性失败，然后基于这些诊断修补指导文件。这与先前使用静态指导或依赖昂贵代理展开进行精调的工作形成对比。该过程将指导质量作为感兴趣的变量隔离，表明指导的生成方式（来自同模型探针的迭代诊断）是使其有效的原因，而非指导内容本身。

methodology.en: The probe-and-refine pipeline (Figure 1) starts with a static knowledge base (static_kb) artifact, which is a generic set of repository-level instructions. This static_kb directly feeds a baseline condition (static-KB) and also enters a refinement loop. In each iteration of the loop, the system generates a set of synthetic bug-fix probes—artificially introduced errors in the repository—and provides them to the coding agent model (Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) as single-shot diagnostic tasks. The model outputs a diagnosis of why the probe failed, which is then used to patch the guidance file via another single-shot LLM call. The process repeats for 5 iterations, with no agent loop or tool use—only single-shot calls. The refined guidance is then fed to the same model during evaluation on SWE-bench Verified. The coding agent operates with a fixed 200-step budget per instance. The hyperparameters: model temperature 0.0 for deterministic outputs, 4 independent trials with 500 instances each. The tuning is model-specific; the same model must be used for both diagnosis and patching to maintain consistency. No evaluation instances are used during refinement; only synthetic probes are employed.
methodology.zh: 探测与精调流程（图1）从静态知识库（static_kb）工件开始，这是一组通用的仓库级指令。该static_kb直接输入基线条件（static-KB）并进入精调循环。在循环的每次迭代中，系统生成一组合成缺陷修复探针——人工引入的仓库错误——并将其提供给代码代理模型（Qwen3.5-35B-A3B）作为单次诊断任务。模型输出探针为何失败的诊断，然后通过另一次单次LLM调用用于修补指导文件。该过程重复5次迭代，没有代理循环或工具使用——只有单次调用。精调后的指导随后在SWE-bench Verified上评估时提供给同一模型。代码代理在每个实例上使用固定的200步预算。超参数：模型温度0.0以保证确定性输出，4次独立试验，每次500个实例。精调是针对特定模型的；必须使用同一模型进行诊断和修补以保持一致性。精调过程中不使用任何评估实例；仅使用合成探针。

experiments.en: Evaluation is on SWE-bench Verified with 500 instances per trial, four independent trials. Three conditions: probe-and-refine (refined guidance), static-KB (static knowledge base), and no context (unguided baseline). Qwen3.5-35B-A3B is used for all conditions at 200 steps. Results: probe-and-refine mean resolve rate 33.0% (SD 1.8pp), vs static-KB 28.3% (SD 1.4pp), vs unguided 25.5% (SD 2.2pp); mixed-effects logistic regression on 6000 observations shows p<0.001 for both contrasts. Coverage (evaluable patches): probe-and-refine 56.2% (SD 1.8pp), unguided 41.7% (SD 2.9pp), a 14.5pp gap. Precision (patch quality) is ~59% across conditions, not statistically different (p=0.119). A step-budget experiment (Figure 7) shows at 25 steps all conditions equivalent (~22-24%); as budget increases, probe-and-refine is the only condition that improves beyond 100 steps, reaching 33% at 200, while unguided plateaus at ~25%. A cross-model experiment with NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B yields lower resolve rates and degraded tuning loop, but per-patch precision remains constant, confirming model-dependence of the diagnostic capability. Repository analysis (Figure 6) shows that repositories with idiosyncratic internal organization (xarray, scikit-learn) benefit disproportionately more, consistent with localization-as-improvement hypothesis.
experiments.zh: 评估在SWE-bench Verified上进行，每次试验500个实例，共4次独立试验。三种条件：探测与精调（精调指导）、static-KB（静态知识库）、无上下文（无指导基线）。所有条件均使用Qwen3.5-35B-A3B，步骤数200。结果：探测与精调平均解决率33.0%（标准差1.8个百分点），对比static-KB 28.3%（标准差1.4pp），无指导25.5%（标准差2.2pp）；对6000个观测值的混合效应逻辑回归显示两个对比的p<0.001。覆盖率（可评估补丁）：探测与精调56.2%（标准差1.8pp），无指导41.7%（标准差2.9pp），差距14.5pp。精度（补丁质量）在所有条件下约59%，无统计差异（p=0.119）。步骤预算实验（图7）显示在25步时所有条件相当（约22-24%）；随着预算增加，探测与精调是唯一在超过100步后继续改善的条件，在200步时达到33%，而无指导在约25%饱和。使用NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B的跨模型实验产生了较低的解决率和退化的精调循环，但每个补丁的精度保持不变，确认了对模型诊断能力的依赖性。仓库分析（图6）显示具有特殊内部组织（xarray, scikit-learn）的仓库受益不成比例，与定位作为改进的假设一致。

conclusion.en: The probe-and-refine tuning method improves coding agent performance by increasing coverage—helping agents reach the correct file—rather than improving patch quality, which remains constant. This approach enables productive use of larger step budgets, with probe-and-refine being the only condition that continues to improve beyond 100 steps. The method is model-dependent, requiring a model capable of generating diagnostic output; otherwise the tuning loop degrades. The key implication is that iterative, same-model diagnosis is the decisive factor for improvement, not the guidance artifact itself, and the primary gain is in localization rather than patch correctness. This suggests that future work should focus on enhancing file localization capabilities and diagnostic output generation, potentially through supervised fine-tuning, rather than optimizing for patch quality.
conclusion.zh: 探测与精调方法通过增加覆盖率——帮助代理到达正确文件——来提高代码代理性能，而不是改善补丁质量，后者保持不变。该方法使代理能够高效使用更大的步骤预算，探测与精调是唯一在超过100步后继续改善的条件。该方法依赖于模型，需要能够生成诊断性输出的模型；否则精调循环会退化。关键含义是迭代的同模型诊断是改进的决定性因素，而非指导工件本身，主要收益在定位而非补丁正确性。这表明未来工作应聚焦于增强文件定位能力和诊断性输出生成，可能通过监督式微调，而不是优化补丁质量。

question.en: How does probe-and-refine tuning relate to post-training techniques like RLHF, given that it uses iterative failure feedback without explicit reward modeling or preference data?
question.zh: 探测与精调与RLHF等后训练技术有何关联？它使用迭代失败反馈，但没有显式的奖励建模或偏好数据。

reason.en: The user is interested in post-training techniques (SFT, RLHF) for improving correctness. The paper introduces a tuning method that refines guidance using synthetic bug-fix probes, which is a form of iterative improvement based on feedback. Comparing this to RLHF could reveal alternative or complementary approaches for repository-level code generation.
reason.zh: 用户对改进正确性的后训练技术（SFT、RLHF）感兴趣。本文介绍了一种通过合成缺陷修复探针精调指导的方法，这是一种基于反馈的迭代改进。将其与RLHF比较可以揭示仓库级代码生成的替代或互补方法。

question.en: Given that refined guidance increases coverage but not patch precision, what are the implications for designing reward functions in RL with execution feedback that prioritize accurate file localization over patch quality?
question.zh: 既然精调指导增加了覆盖率但未提高补丁精度，那么在带有执行反馈的强化学习中，设计优先考虑准确文件定位而非补丁质量的奖励函数有何启示？

reason.en: The paper shows that improvement comes from coverage (reaching the correct file) rather than patch quality. This insight is directly relevant to the user's interest in RL with execution feedback, as it suggests that reward signals should target file-localization accuracy to maximize resolve rate.
reason.zh: 论文显示改进来自覆盖率（到达正确文件）而非补丁质量。这一发现直接关系到用户对带有执行反馈的强化学习的兴趣，表明奖励信号应针对文件定位准确度以最大化解决率。

question.en: Why does the probe-and-refine loop degrade when the model cannot generate sufficiently diagnostic output, and how could SFT on diagnostic outputs improve the tuning process?
question.zh: 当模型无法生成足够诊断性的输出时，探测与精调循环为何退化？SFT在诊断输出上如何改进精调过程？

reason.en: The cross-model experiment shows degradation with a weaker model, linking to the user's interest in SFT and model training. The question probes the role of diagnostic capability in the refinement loop and suggests a potential SFT intervention to enhance it.
reason.zh: 跨模型实验显示较弱模型导致退化，这与用户对SFT和模型训练的兴趣相关。该问题探讨了诊断能力在精调循环中的作用，并提出了通过SFT增强诊断能力的潜在干预。

question.en: How does probe-and-refine exploit long-context capabilities of the underlying LLM, and would the method benefit from models with extended context windows for processing entire repositories?
question.zh: 探测与精调如何利用底层LLM的长上下文能力？该方法是否会受益于扩展上下文窗口以处理整个仓库？

reason.en: The user cares about long-context handling. The paper uses single-shot LLM calls with repository guidance, which implicitly leverages context. Understanding how the method scales with context size could inform future work on repository-level generation.
reason.zh: 用户关心长上下文处理。论文使用单次LLM调用和仓库指导，隐式利用了上下文。理解该方法如何随上下文大小扩展可以为未来的仓库级生成工作提供信息。

question.en: Could the probe-and-refine procedure be extended to incorporate execution feedback from test suite runs, and how would that compare to the current synthetic probe approach?
question.zh: 探测与精调过程能否扩展以纳入测试套件运行的执行反馈？与当前的合成探针方法相比如何？

reason.en: The user is interested in execution feedback for training. The paper uses synthetic bug-fix probes as implicit execution feedback; explicitly using test suite results could strengthen the refinement. This question explores a direct extension aligned with the user's interests.
reason.zh: 用户对训练中的执行反馈感兴趣。论文使用合成缺陷修复探针作为隐式执行反馈；显式使用测试套件结果可以加强精调。这个问题探索了与用户兴趣直接相关的扩展。

question.en: How does probe-and-refine tuning relate to post-training techniques like RLHF, given that it uses iterative failure feedback without explicit reward modeling or preference data?
question.zh: 探测与精调与RLHF等后训练技术有何关联？它使用迭代失败反馈，但没有显式的奖励建模或偏好数据。

reason.en: The user is interested in post-training techniques (SFT, RLHF) for improving correctness. The paper introduces a tuning method that refines guidance using synthetic bug-fix probes, which is a form of iterative improvement based on feedback. Comparing this to RLHF could reveal alternative or complementary approaches for repository-level code generation.
reason.zh: 用户对改进正确性的后训练技术（SFT、RLHF）感兴趣。本文介绍了一种通过合成缺陷修复探针精调指导的方法，这是一种基于反馈的迭代改进。将其与RLHF比较可以揭示仓库级代码生成的替代或互补方法。

answer.en: Probe-and-refine tuning is a distinct alternative to RLHF that is complementary in goal but fundamentally different in mechanism. Unlike RLHF, which relies on explicit reward modeling from human preference data, probe-and-refine uses synthetic bug-fix probes to iteratively update a repository guidance file via “single-shot LLM calls, with no agent loop or tool use during tuning.” The feedback is not a reward signal but diagnostic information from probe failures, which is used to “patch” the guidance. The paper notes that “improved guidance helps agents reach the correct file rather than improving the quality of the changes,” whereas RLHF typically optimizes for response-level quality. Thus, probe-and-refine provides a lightweight, iterative method for improving navigational context—a form of post-training that could complement RLHF by addressing coverage (getting to the right file) without requiring preference data.
answer.zh: 探测与精调是RLHF的一种独特替代方案，目标互补但机制根本不同。与依赖人类偏好数据的显式奖励建模的RLHF不同，探测与精调使用合成缺陷修复探针，通过“单次LLM调用，精调过程中没有代理循环或工具使用”来迭代更新仓库指导文件。反馈不是奖励信号，而是来自探针失败的诊断信息，用于“修补”指导。论文指出，“改进的指导帮助代理到达正确的文件，而不是提高变更的质量”，而RLHF通常优化响应级别的质量。因此，探测与精调提供了一种轻量级的迭代方法，用于改进导航上下文——这是一种后训练形式，可以通过解决覆盖率（到达正确文件）来补充RLHF，而无需偏好数据。

question.en: Given that refined guidance increases coverage but not patch precision, what are the implications for designing reward functions in RL with execution feedback that prioritize accurate file localization over patch quality?
question.zh: 既然精调指导增加了覆盖率但未提高补丁精度，那么在带有执行反馈的强化学习中，设计优先考虑准确文件定位而非补丁质量的奖励函数有何启示？

reason.en: The paper shows that improvement comes from coverage (reaching the correct file) rather than patch quality. This insight is directly relevant to the user's interest in RL with execution feedback, as it suggests that reward signals should target file-localization accuracy to maximize resolve rate.
reason.zh: 论文显示改进来自覆盖率（到达正确文件）而非补丁质量。这一发现直接关系到用户对带有执行反馈的强化学习的兴趣，表明奖励信号应针对文件定位准确度以最大化解决率。

answer.en: The paper's finding that improved guidance mainly increases coverage (reaching the correct file) without improving patch precision directly implies that reward functions in RL with execution feedback should prioritize accurate file localization over patch quality. The authors state: "The improvement comes from coverage rather than precision: refined guidance produces evaluable patches for 14.5 percentage points (pp) more instances while per-patch precision remains statistically constant (~59%, p = 0.119), showing that improved guidance helps agents reach the correct file rather than improving the quality of the changes they make." Thus, rewarding agents for correct file localization would be more impactful than rewarding patch correctness, as the gain is entirely in coverage.
answer.zh: 论文发现改进的指导主要增加了覆盖率（到达正确文件）而未提高补丁精度，这直接意味着在带有执行反馈的强化学习中，奖励函数应优先考虑准确的文件定位而非补丁质量。作者指出：“改进来自覆盖率而非精度：精调指导使可评估补丁的实例数量增加了14.5个百分点，而每个补丁的精度在统计上保持不变（约59%，p=0.119），这表明改进的指导帮助代理到达正确的文件，而不是提高它们所做变更的质量。”因此，奖励代理正确文件定位比奖励补丁正确性更具影响力，因为收益完全在覆盖率上。

question.en: Why does the probe-and-refine loop degrade when the model cannot generate sufficiently diagnostic output, and how could SFT on diagnostic outputs improve the tuning process?
question.zh: 当模型无法生成足够诊断性的输出时，探测与精调循环为何退化？SFT在诊断输出上如何改进精调过程？

reason.en: The cross-model experiment shows degradation with a weaker model, linking to the user's interest in SFT and model training. The question probes the role of diagnostic capability in the refinement loop and suggests a potential SFT intervention to enhance it.
reason.zh: 跨模型实验显示较弱模型导致退化，这与用户对SFT和模型训练的兴趣相关。该问题探讨了诊断能力在精调循环中的作用，并提出了通过SFT增强诊断能力的潜在干预。

answer.en: The probe-and-refine loop degrades because a weaker model 'cannot generate sufficiently diagnostic output,' as shown by the cross-model experiment where 'the tuning loop degrades when the model cannot generate sufficiently diagnostic output, though per-patch precision remains constant even then' (abstract). This indicates that the refinement steps rely on diagnostic probes to identify guidance flaws, and insufficiently diagnostic output leads to less effective tuning. Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on diagnostic outputs could improve the tuning process by enhancing the model's ability to generate such outputs, thereby preventing degradation and making the loop more robust, though the paper does not test this intervention directly.
answer.zh: 探测与精调循环退化是因为较弱的模型“无法生成足够诊断性的输出”，如跨模型实验所示，“当模型无法生成足够诊断性的输出时，精调循环会退化，但即使如此每个补丁的精度保持不变”（摘要）。这表明精调步骤依赖诊断探针来识别指导缺陷，而诊断性不足的输出导致精调效果较差。在诊断输出上进行监督式微调（SFT）可以通过增强模型生成此类输出的能力来改进精调过程，从而防止退化并使循环更稳健，尽管论文没有直接测试这种干预。

question.en: How does probe-and-refine exploit long-context capabilities of the underlying LLM, and would the method benefit from models with extended context windows for processing entire repositories?
question.zh: 探测与精调如何利用底层LLM的长上下文能力？该方法是否会受益于扩展上下文窗口以处理整个仓库？

reason.en: The user cares about long-context handling. The paper uses single-shot LLM calls with repository guidance, which implicitly leverages context. Understanding how the method scales with context size could inform future work on repository-level generation.
reason.zh: 用户关心长上下文处理。论文使用单次LLM调用和仓库指导，隐式利用了上下文。理解该方法如何随上下文大小扩展可以为未来的仓库级生成工作提供信息。

answer.en: Probe-and-refine does not directly exploit the long-context capabilities of the underlying LLM in the sense of processing large repository contexts in a single call. Instead, it leverages “single-shot LLM calls” to iteratively diagnose and patch the repository’s guidance file using synthetic bug-fix probes, with “no agent loop or tool use during tuning.” The method implicitly relies on the model’s ability to reason about local code snippets rather than whole repositories; the guidance file itself serves as a compressed, higher-level summary that the agent later uses at inference time. The paper notes that the improvement from refined guidance “comes from coverage rather than precision,” enabling the agent to “reach the correct file” in more cases. As for whether the method would benefit from extended context windows for processing entire repositories, the paper does not test this directly. It shows that guidance “is what lets the agent use a larger step budget productively,” suggesting that richer guidance—potentially from longer context—could help, but no experiment varies model context length. The abstract and experimental design focus on tuning a static knowledge base via short probes, not on ingesting entire repositories. Therefore, the paper provides no evidence that extended context windows would benefit probe-and-refine itself, only indirect hints that better-informed guidance (potentially from broader context) might improve agent coverage.
answer.zh: 探测与精调并非直接利用底层LLM的长上下文能力来处理单个调用中的大型仓库上下文。相反，它利用“单次LLM调用”通过合成缺陷修复探针迭代地诊断和修补仓库的指导文件，“在精调过程中没有代理循环或工具使用”。该方法隐式依赖于模型推理本地代码片段的能力，而非整个仓库；指导文件本身充当了压缩的高级摘要，供代理在推理时使用。论文指出改进来自“覆盖率而非精度”，使代理能够在更多情况下“到达正确文件”。至于该方法是否会受益于扩展上下文窗口以处理整个仓库，论文没有直接测试。它表明指导“让代理高效地使用更大的步骤预算”，暗示更丰富的指导（可能来自更长上下文）可能有帮助，但没有实验改变模型上下文长度。摘要和实验设计专注于通过短探针精调静态知识库，而非摄取整个仓库。因此，论文没有提供扩展上下文窗口会直接使探测与精调受益的证据，只有间接提示更知情的指导（可能来自更广泛的上下文）可能改善代理覆盖率。

question.en: Could the probe-and-refine procedure be extended to incorporate execution feedback from test suite runs, and how would that compare to the current synthetic probe approach?
question.zh: 探测与精调过程能否扩展以纳入测试套件运行的执行反馈？与当前的合成探针方法相比如何？

reason.en: The user is interested in execution feedback for training. The paper uses synthetic bug-fix probes as implicit execution feedback; explicitly using test suite results could strengthen the refinement. This question explores a direct extension aligned with the user's interests.
reason.zh: 用户对训练中的执行反馈感兴趣。论文使用合成缺陷修复探针作为隐式执行反馈；显式使用测试套件结果可以加强精调。这个问题探索了与用户兴趣直接相关的扩展。

answer.en: The paper does not directly describe extending its probe-and-refine procedure to incorporate explicit test suite execution feedback, nor does it compare such an extension to the current synthetic probe approach. However, it does mention that the current method uses "synthetic bug-fix probes" as implicit execution feedback, achieving improved coverage ("refined guidance produces evaluable patches for 14.5 percentage points (pp) more instances") while keeping per-patch precision constant (~59%). The authors note that the improvement comes from "coverage rather than precision," and that improved guidance "helps agents reach the correct file rather than improving the quality of the changes they make." This suggests that explicit test suite feedback could potentially strengthen the refinement process, but the paper does not explore or validate this extension. The abstract states that the procedure uses "synthetic bug-fix probes to iteratively diagnose and patch a repository's guidance file through single-shot LLM calls, with no agent loop or tool use during tuning," indicating a deliberate design choice to avoid tool-based (including test suite) feedback. As such, any comparison to an execution-feedback variant would be speculative based on the paper's findings.
answer.zh: 论文没有直接描述将其探测与精调过程扩展以纳入显式的测试套件执行反馈，也没有将这种扩展与当前的合成探针方法进行比较。但论文提到当前方法使用“合成缺陷修复探针”作为隐式执行反馈，实现了覆盖率提升（“精调指导使可评估补丁的实例数量增加了14.5个百分点”），同时保持每个补丁的精度不变（约59%）。作者指出改进来自“覆盖率而非精度”，改进的指导“帮助代理到达正确的文件，而不是提高它们所做变更的质量”。这表明显式的测试套件反馈可能加强精调过程，但论文没有探索或验证这种扩展。摘要指出该过程使用“合成缺陷修复探针，通过单次LLM调用迭代诊断和修补仓库的指导文件，精调过程中没有代理循环或工具使用”，这表明有意避免基于工具（包括测试套件）的反馈。因此，任何与执行反馈变体的比较都是基于论文发现的推测。
